author: Koray Tugberk Gubur
title: Koray's Agents: Generative AI Agents for Semantic SEO and Topical Authority
content: Medium article about Koray's Agents - an extensive collection of 48 AI agents (custom ChatGPT tools) designed for semantic SEO professionals. These agents cover linguistic analysis, semantic extraction, entity mapping, topicality, sentiment processing, SEO auditing, data analysis, summarization, and technical generators. The agents are designed to perform natural language processing, understanding, and generation tasks while helping users comprehend the necessities of Semantic SEO. Output from these agents provides reasons, directions, hints, and contexts for various SEO tasks.
